items.title: The Sovereign Mind - Part I
items.excerpt: Those who win know when not to and when to adopt intellectual technology
items.summary: Essay explores the concept of intellectual sovereignty in the digital age, arguing that success depends on knowing when to embrace or resist new technological tools. The piece emphasizes developing discernment about which intellectual technologies enhance versus diminish human cognitive capacity.
items.pullQuote: knowing when to embrace or resist new technological tools

items.title: 💥 The Truth About Rising Oil, Stagflation, and the AI Job Wipeout. Here's what to do.
items.excerpt: Oil up 35%. 92,000 jobs gone. Robots are getting real. The third industrial revolution is starting now. Are You Prepared?

The analysis warns of potential stagflation and positions the current period as the beginning of a third industrial revolution requiring strategic preparation.
items.pullQuote: Third industrial revolution starting now with 35% oil surge and massive job displacement
